title: Therapy and Treatment
learningObjectives: Trace the historical evolution of mental health treatment from early asylums to modern community-based approaches
Compare and contrast the major types of psychotherapy including psychodynamic, humanistic, cognitive, and behavioral approaches
Describe the various treatment modalities including individual, group, couples, and family therapy
Explain the unique challenges involved in treating substance-related and addictive disorders
Analyze how sociocultural factors influence access to and utilization of mental health services
